ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "field_id" TEXT /* Reference to the field associated with the report */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the report in the sequence */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label providing multilingual descriptions of the report */,
  "hint1" TEXT /* Hints for additional information */,
  "hint2" TEXT /* Additional hints for context or details */,
  "score_points" INTEGER /* Score points associated with the report for reliability */,
  "score_type" INTEGER /* Type of scoring system applied to the report */,
  "block_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if submission of this report should be blocked */,
  "trigger_receiver" TEXT /* Receivers of triggers based on this report */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the report was submitted */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., direct witness, second-hand information) */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes from the reporter */,
  "sensitive_data_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report contains sensitive data */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field (e.g., Witness Testimony) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the field's purpose */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input (e.g., text, file upload) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the field is mandatory */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length for text inputs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the reporting process (e.g., victim, witness, reporter) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident category (e.g., assault, discrimination) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" TEXT /* Reference to a parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_scores" (
  "score_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "report_id" TEXT /* Reference to the incident report being scored */,
  "score_points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the report */,
  "score_type" INTEGER /* Type of score (e.g., reliability, urgency) */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who scored the report */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_scores_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES incident_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_scores_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "report_id" TEXT /* Reference to the incident report that triggered it */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was triggered */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* User ID of the recipient */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_to FOREIGN KEY ("sent_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES incident_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_status" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "report_id" TEXT /* Reference to the incident report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., submitted, under review, resolved) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last status update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who updated the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was first set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES incident_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
